case_title: CARLOS DIAZ ET AL VS. NEFTALI PEREZ

docket_entries.description: RETURNED MAIL: ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO CARLOS DIAZ RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED, UNABLE TO FORWARD
DECLARATION OF CARLOS DIAZ RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIAZ, CARLOS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIAZ, CARLOS MARTINEZ, JORGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEREZ, NEFTALI $3,094.75 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,144.75, JUDGMENT FOR CARLOS DIAZ - $2,227.50, JUDGMENT FOR JORGE MARTINEZ - $867.25. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY NEFTALI PEREZ IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. "MOTION TO VACATE IS GRANTED. MATTER IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---EUNJI AVERILL. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,094.75 FILED BY DIAZ, CARLOS MARTINEZ, JORGE AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, NEFTALI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-22-2014 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-09-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, NEFTALI
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT PEREZ, NEFTALI HEARING SET FOR MAR-24-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS MOTION - CONTINUE ORDER RETURNED. SENT TO: PLAINTIFF - DIAZ, CARLOS. (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED- NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO CARLOS DIAZ RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN, UNABLE TO FORWARD
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR FOR DISMISSAL HEARING SET FOR JUN-16-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, PER COURT ORDER OF 6/16/15. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURNED MAIL: ORDER MAILED TO CARLOS DIAZ RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED, UNABLE TO FORWARD
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-05-2015 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-22-2014 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-05-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-05-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF CARLOS DIAZ WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF JORGE MARTINEZ WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-05-2015 - JUDGMENT.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY NEFTALI PEREZ SET FOR MAR-24-2015 IS CONTINUED TO JUN-16-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN 506. THE PLAINTIFF DIAZ WAS PRESENT. THE PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ WAS NOT PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT NEEDS A SPANISH INTERPRETER. THE COURT WILL ORDER A SPANISH INTERPRETER FOR THE NEXT CALLING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506
